message:
fcp-crypto: document shamir module in crate-level Modules list

The shamir module is publicly declared (pub mod shamir) and exports a
full Shamir secret sharing implementation — split_secret,
reconstruct_secret, SealedShamirShare, split_and_seal, open_share — but
the crate-level rustdoc Modules block listed only 10 of the 11 modules
and made no mention of Shamir anywhere. This matters because the docs
advertise threshold signing via FROST but omit the Shamir-based
owner-key distribution path that the codebase actually implements.

Add a Modules bullet so the crate docs accurately enumerate what's
available to consumers. No code change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
